# hey-api

https://github.com/hey-api/openapi-ts

## CLI
```shell
npx @hey-api/openapi-ts -i ./api-docs.json -o ./client
```
## Generated

```typescript filename="client/types.gen.ts"
// This file is auto-generated by @hey-api/openapi-ts

export type Post = {
    id: number;
    user: User;
    content: string;
};

export type User = {
    username: string;
    email?: string | null;
};

export type AllPostResponse = Array<Post>;

export type $OpenApiTs = {
    '/posts': {
        get: {
            res: {
                /**
                 * OK
                 */
                200: Array<Post>;
            };
        };
    };
};
```

```typescript filename="client/schemas.gen.ts"
// This file is auto-generated by @hey-api/openapi-ts

export const $Post = {
    required: ['content', 'id', 'user'],
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
        id: {
            type: 'integer',
            format: 'int64'
        },
        user: {
            '$ref': '#/components/schemas/User'
        },
        content: {
            type: 'string'
        }
    }
} as const;

export const $User = {
    required: ['username'],
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
        username: {
            type: 'string'
        },
        email: {
            type: 'string',
            nullable: true
        }
    }
} as const;
```

```typescript filename="client/services.gen.ts"
// This file is auto-generated by @hey-api/openapi-ts

import type { CancelablePromise } from './core/CancelablePromise';
import { OpenAPI } from './core/OpenAPI';
import { request as __request } from './core/request';
import type { AllPostResponse } from './types.gen';

export class TestControllerService {
    /**
     * @returns Post OK
     * @throws ApiError
     */
    public static allPost(): CancelablePromise<AllPostResponse> {
        return __request(OpenAPI, {
            method: 'GET',
            url: '/posts'
        });
    }
    
}
```
and core
